title: Brazilian Chicken and Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish that combines the crispy texture of fried chicken with the freshness of tropical ingredients.

ingredients.name: frying oil
ingredients.notes: such as vegetable or peanut oil

ingredients.name: Brazilian spices
ingredients.notes: such as cumin, coriander, or paprika

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, mix together chicken, tropical fruit, crisp lettuce, and Brazilian spices.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Heat frying oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add chicken mixture to skillet and cook until chicken is golden brown and cooked through.
5. Add cooked rice to skillet and stir to combine with chicken mixture.
6. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until rice is heated through.
